headline: How The Ecolab (ECL) Story Is Shifting With CoolIT And Pricing Power Debates
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Ecolab has edged to US$319.29, compared with the previous US$320.43, signaling a fine tuning rather than a reset of expectations. This shift sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst reactions, with some firms lifting targets on pricing confidence and others trimming them after the US$4.75b CoolIT acquisition and valuation questions. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving narrative around Ecolab and what to watch...
